meta.title: Our Projects
meta.description: Browse Roofpro's recent residential and commercial roofing projects — re-roofs, flat-roof systems, shingle replacements and metal roofing across the region.

header.description: A close look at recent work across residential and commercial properties, each one delivered with the same precision, attention to detail and durable materials that define every single Roofpro project.

stats.description: Years of dedicated work distilled into the numbers that tell our story, reflecting a lasting commitment to quality, safety and durable results our customers can see and genuinely count on.
